item.description:
✨ New Features & Visual Improvements

  • New Element Search: Quickly search for your elements directly from the bar, allowing you to find what you need instantly.
  • Clearer Design Settings: We have completely redesigned the configuration panel. It is now more modern, clean, and easy to navigate, making it simpler to customize your experience.
  • Unified Option Cards: Configuration menus now use a consistent and elegant card design, making switching options much more intuitive.
  • Preview Improvements: Thumbnail and style editing now features a more responsive and eye-friendly design.

🚀 Fluidity & Smart Behavior

  • Smoother Animations: The bar shows and hides much more fluidly, adapting better to your cursor movement and preventing accidental triggers or annoying flickering.
  • Smart Screen Adjustment: The bar positions itself more precisely below the system menu bar, avoiding overlaps or covering important macOS elements.
  • More Stable Element Layout: Fixed minor jumps or abrupt movements of the far-right icons when changing size or state. Everything now repositions smoothly and cleanly.

⚡ Performance & Battery

  • System Optimization: Redesigned internal bar calculations to consume fewer CPU resources, resulting in faster response times and improved battery life for your Mac.
  • More Efficient Memory: Optimized memory usage to prevent overloading, ensuring the app runs flawlessly even during long sessions.

🛡️ Stability & Reliability

  • Automatic Recovery: If the macOS gesture or click detection system experiences a temporary interruption, the app now recovers instantly on its own without needing a restart.
  • Enhanced Security: Strengthened internal security and the licensing system to better protect your personal information.
  • Silent Error Logging: The app now proactively detects and resolves minor background issues, ensuring a much more stable and seamless experience.
